journey.name: Load descriptor
journey.description: Pastes a wallet descriptor in Settings, submits it, verifies the descriptor list updates, then opens the share sheet and copies the loaded descriptor back to the clipboard (issue #113), all without the app crashing.

actions.action: Launch the Mandacaru app and wait for the splash screen to dismiss (poll until nav_node is present)
Expand the Descriptors section if it is collapsed
Verify the descriptors list shows the loaded descriptor or a confirmation, and the app has not crashed
Tap the loaded descriptor row (button_share_descriptor; if more than one row is present, target the first) to open the share sheet
On the share sheet's default "Descriptor" tab, tap the Copy button (target by the "Copy" text; the sheet renders in a separate window so tab/button testTags do not surface)
Verify a "Descriptor copied to clipboard" snackbar appears (target by text) and the app has not crashed
